presenceCondition:
(or (and (not CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES)
         (and __STRICT_ANSI__ (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
         (not CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES))
    (and (not CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES)
         (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
              (not _STDLIB_H)
              (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
         (not CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES))
    (and CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES
         (and __STRICT_ANSI__ (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
         CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES)
    (and CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES
         (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
              (not _STDLIB_H)
              (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
         CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES))
